chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.53 of 2015 Sindh Revenue Board Versus Augere Pakistan (Pvt.) Ltd. & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of CMA 428/15 Dated: 16.04.2024 Mr. Jawed Ali Sangi for appellant. Mr. Ghulam Hussain Shah for respondent No.1. Mr. Nadeem Ahmed for respondent No.2. Mr. Abdul Jaleel Zubedi, Assistant Advocate General -.-.- Learned counsel for the appellant has filed a statement and submits that against some interlocutory order this appeal was preferred however during pendency of this appeal even the suit itself was disposed of on 26.01.2021, copy whereof is attached along with the statement, which is taken on record. Learned counsel for the appellant has given a bold oral statement that this appeal has become infructuous in view of above. If that is the contention of learned counsel for the appellant there is no purpose to keep this lis in docket. Instant High Court Appeal is accordingly dismissed along with listed application. Judge Judge
